_comment: TRUE POSITIVE — SP-107001 (Impact): Mass file rename indicating active ransomware encryption
scenario: Active ransomware encrypting files: 500+ files renamed with .locked extension within 2 minutes

events.description: FileCreate burst — 523 file rename events in 120 seconds

why_tp: 523 files renamed in 120 seconds — far exceeds normal user behavior
Consistent extension addition (.locked) — ransomware encryption pattern
Process is C:\Windows\Temp\update.exe — unusual staging location
Affects multiple shares simultaneously — ransomware spreading via mapped drives
analyst_action: IMMEDIATE: Disconnect FILE-SERVER-01 from network to stop further encryption
IMMEDIATE: Check which workstation is connected to FILE-SERVER-01 via SMB (find source of update.exe)
Assess which shares are affected — classify data sensitivity
Do NOT restart or shutdown hosts — preserve forensic memory
